ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: System chip (Hasty process)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A chip used to adjust how the cloning vat will function. It will make the vat work way faster, but it will increase the instability gained proportionately.

ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.label: System chip (Cautious process)
ProjectSilverSquad.BrainChipDef.description: A chip used to adjust how the cloning vat will function. It will make the vat work way slower, but it will decrease the instability gained proportionately.
